description: Qwen3.5 fused residual add and Gemma-style RMSNorm with configurable offset.
name: qwen3_5_residual_add_gemma_rms_norm
reference:
# Source: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/aad13b87ed59f2afcfaebc985f403301887a35fc/src/transformers/models/qwen3_5/modeling_qwen3_5.py#L875-L881
# Source: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/aad13b87ed59f2afcfaebc985f403301887a35fc/src/transformers/models/qwen3_5/modeling_qwen3_5.py#L814-L822
import torch

def run(residual, x, weight, eps, offset=1.0):
    summed = residual + x
    s = summed.float()
    output = s * torch.rsqrt(s.pow(2).mean(-1, keepdim=True) + eps)
    output = output * (offset + weight.float())
    return summed, output.type_as(summed)
